summary: Iteration 69: 5-Tier Subscription System with Stripe - All 30 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Pricing page shows all 5 tiers (Free $0/50 credits, Starter $4.99/100, Plus $9.99/300, Premium $24.99/unlimited, Super User $49.99/unlimited), 3 credit packs ($5=100, $10=225, $20=500), AI cost breakdown toggle, Full Perk Comparison expandable sections. Nav shows teal credits badge linking to /pricing. Profile dropdown includes 'Subscription' link. Upgrade buttons generate real Stripe checkout URLs (cs_test_...) and redirect to stripe.com. Existing features (Star Chart cultures, Trade Circle stats) still work.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 69 verified subscription system. Backend: GET /api/subscriptions/tiers returns all 5 tiers with pricing, credit packs, AI costs (no auth). GET /api/subscriptions/my-plan returns user's tier, balance, perks (auth required). POST /api/subscriptions/checkout creates Stripe session for tier upgrades (rejects 'free' and invalid tiers). POST /api/subscriptions/checkout-credits creates Stripe session for credit packs. POST /api/subscriptions/use-credits deducts credits (returns 402 if insufficient). POST /api/subscriptions/cancel downgrades to free tier. GET /api/subscriptions/credit-history returns credit log. Frontend: /pricing page shows tier cards with 'Current Plan' badge on user's tier, upgrade buttons on higher tiers. Credit packs show $5/$10/$20 buy buttons. 'Show AI Costs' toggle reveals cost breakdown. Nav credits badge (teal) shows balance and links to /pricing. Profile dropdown has 'Subscription' link. Test user has 8 credits on Free tier.

backend_api.GET /api/subscriptions/tiers: ✓ Returns all 5 tiers with correct pricing

frontend_ui.all_5_tier_cards: ✓ Free, Starter, Plus, Premium, Super User cards displayed
frontend_ui.tier_pricing_correct: ✓ Free=$0, Starter=$4.99, Plus=$9.99, Premium=$24.99, Super User=$49.99

frontend_ui.upgrade_buttons: ✓ Starter, Plus, Premium, Super User show 'UPGRADE' buttons
